Title: Board Approved IT Strategy
Description: NBFCs with asset size of ₹ 500 crore and above shall have a Board approved IT Strategy aligned with their business strategy
Requirements: IT Strategy aligned with business strategy; Reviewed periodically; Updated as per business changes

Title: IT Strategy Committee of the Board
Description: NBFCs shall constitute an IT Strategy Committee of the Board (ITSC) comprising at least two members of the Board
Requirements: At least two Board members; One member with adequate technology expertise; CIO as permanent invitee; Meets at least once every quarter

Title: Chief Information Officer (CIO)
Description: NBFCs shall designate a senior level official as Chief Information Officer
Requirements: Senior level official as CIO; Direct reporting to MD/CEO; Part of Top Management; Adequate authority and reporting structure

Title: Chief Information Security Officer (CISO)
Description: NBFCs shall designate a senior level official as CISO separate from the CIO
Requirements: Separate from CIO; Adequate independence and authority; Responsible for information security function

Title: Information Security Policy
Description: NBFCs shall have a comprehensive Information Security Policy duly approved by the Board
Requirements: Board approved policy; Cover all aspects of information security; Reviewed at least once every year; Updated to address emerging threats

Title: Cyber Security Policy
Description: NBFCs shall frame a Cyber Security Policy covering detection, containment, prevention and recovery from cyber incidents
Requirements: Detection mechanisms; Incident response procedures; Recovery plans; Preventive measures

Title: Cyber Crisis Management Plan
Description: NBFCs shall formulate a Cyber Crisis Management Plan approved by the Board
Requirements: Board approved plan; Incident response procedures; Communication protocols; Recovery strategies

Title: Cyber Incident Reporting to RBI
Description: NBFCs shall report significant cyber incidents to RBI immediately
Requirements: Immediate reporting to RBI; Detailed incident information; Impact assessment; Remediation actions

Title: Access Control
Description: NBFCs shall implement stringent access control mechanisms
Requirements: User authentication mechanisms; Role-based access control; Privileged access management; Regular access reviews

Title: Patch Management
Description: NBFCs shall have a documented patch management policy
Requirements: Timely patching of systems; Testing before deployment; Critical patches applied urgently; Documentation of patch status

Title: Anti-Malware Protection
Description: NBFCs shall deploy appropriate anti-malware solutions
Requirements: Anti-virus/anti-malware software; Regular signature updates; Real-time scanning; Centralized management

Title: Network Security
Description: NBFCs shall implement network security controls including firewalls, IDS/IPS
Requirements: Firewall implementation; Intrusion detection/prevention systems; Network segmentation; Regular security monitoring

Title: Encryption
Description: NBFCs shall use encryption for sensitive data at rest and in transit
Requirements: Encryption of data at rest; Encryption of data in transit; Strong encryption algorithms; Key management procedures

Title: Secure Software Development
Description: NBFCs shall adopt secure coding practices and conduct security testing
Requirements: Secure coding standards; Code review processes; Security testing (SAST/DAST); Vulnerability assessments

Title: Mobile Financial Services Security
Description: NBFCs offering mobile financial services shall implement additional security measures
Requirements: Multi-factor authentication; Secure communication channels; Device binding; Transaction limits

Title: Social Media Usage Policy
Description: NBFCs shall have a policy for official use of social media
Requirements: Approved social media policy; Authorized personnel only; Monitoring of social media channels; Incident response for social media

Title: Change Management
Description: NBFCs shall have a documented change management process
Requirements: Formal change approval process; Testing in non-production environment; Rollback procedures; Change documentation

Title: Capacity Management
Description: NBFCs shall monitor and manage IT infrastructure capacity
Requirements: Regular capacity monitoring; Capacity planning; Performance optimization; Scalability considerations

Title: Incident Management
Description: NBFCs shall have an IT incident management process
Requirements: Incident logging and tracking; Prioritization and escalation; Root cause analysis; Incident resolution documentation

Title: System and Data Backup
Description: NBFCs shall have comprehensive backup procedures
Requirements: Regular automated backups; Offsite backup storage; Backup testing and restoration; Retention as per policy

Title: Logging and Monitoring
Description: NBFCs shall implement comprehensive logging and monitoring
Requirements: System and application logs; Security event monitoring; Log retention and protection; Regular log review

Title: Annual IS Audit
Description: NBFCs shall conduct annual IS Audit by independent auditors
Requirements: Annual IS Audit mandatory; Independent external auditors; CISA/CISM qualified auditors preferred; Report submitted to Board and RBI

Title: IS Audit Scope
Description: IS Audit shall cover IT governance, security, operations and compliance
Requirements: IT governance assessment; Security controls review; Operations assessment; Regulatory compliance check

Title: Computer Assisted Audit Techniques (CAATs)
Description: IS Auditors should use CAATs for critical areas
Requirements: Use of CAATs in critical areas; Revenue leakage detection; Transaction monitoring; AML compliance checking

Title: Business Continuity Plan
Description: NBFCs shall have a Board approved Business Continuity Plan
Requirements: Board approved BCP; Business Impact Analysis; Recovery strategies; Regular BCP testing

Title: Business Impact Analysis
Description: NBFCs shall conduct Business Impact Analysis to identify critical systems
Requirements: Identify critical business processes; Determine recovery priorities; Assess impact of disruptions; Define recovery time objectives

Title: Disaster Recovery Site
Description: NBFCs shall consider backup sites for critical systems and data centers
Requirements: Backup site for critical systems; Data center redundancy; Geographically separated; Regular DR testing

Title: BCP Testing
Description: NBFCs shall test BCP at least annually or when significant changes occur
Requirements: Annual BCP testing minimum; Worst case scenario testing; Gap analysis; Results reported to Board

Title: IT Outsourcing Policy
Description: NBFCs shall have a Board approved IT outsourcing policy
Requirements: Board approved policy; Risk assessment framework; Due diligence process; Governance mechanism

Title: Outsourcing Contracts
Description: NBFCs shall have comprehensive written agreements for IT outsourcing
Requirements: Written contractual agreements; Legal counsel review; Monitoring and oversight clauses; Audit rights for NBFC and RBI

Title: Outsourcing Risk Management
Description: Board and senior management are responsible for outsourcing risk management
Requirements: Board oversight of outsourcing; Risk-based policies and procedures; Periodic review of arrangements; Independent audit of service providers

Title: Service Provider BCP
Description: NBFCs shall ensure service providers have adequate BCP
Requirements: Service provider BCP assessment; Regular BCP testing by provider; Integration with NBFC's BCP; Contractual BCP requirements

Title: IT Policy for Smaller NBFCs
Description: NBFCs with asset size below ₹ 500 crore shall have Board approved IT policy
Requirements: Board approved IT policy; Basic security controls; User access controls; Maker-checker concept

Title: Basic Security for Smaller NBFCs
Description: Smaller NBFCs shall implement basic security controls
Requirements: Physical and logical access controls; Password policy; Maker-checker controls; Information security basics

Title: Backup for Smaller NBFCs
Description: Smaller NBFCs shall have data backup arrangements with periodic testing
Requirements: Regular data backups; Periodic backup testing; Backup retention policy; Offsite storage consideration

Title: BCP for Smaller NBFCs
Description: Smaller NBFCs shall have Board approved BCP with annual oversight
Requirements: Board approved BCP; Annual Board review; Basic recovery procedures; Critical system identification

Title: Regulatory Reporting for Smaller NBFCs
Description: IT systems shall be adequate to file regulatory returns to RBI
Requirements: COSMOS returns capability; Accurate data reporting; Timely regulatory submissions; Data quality controls
